schema.name: detected-fs-antipattern
schema.documentation: Display the detected antipatterns and offer suggestions on how to mitigate them

narrative.fmt: PromptManager (34205) failed performing fgetattrlist on ( Unknown Path ) with: Bad file descriptor.
Return values indicating an error can often be overlooked. Verify that your software can tolerate and respond well to this error.

narrative-text.fmt: Return values indicating an error can often be overlooked. Verify that your software can tolerate and respond well to this error.

narrative.narrative-text: Return values indicating an error can often be overlooked. Verify that your software can tolerate and respond well to this error.

narrative.fmt: PromptManager (34205) read logical block 0x610b51a from path unknown (vnode 0x8d58a8f1bd01721f) on disk after previously performing Page In on it.
Certain file descriptor properties, such as F_NOCACHE, can cause this to occur. Consider disabling any limitations that are preventing frequently used data from being cached.

narrative-text.fmt: Certain file descriptor properties, such as F_NOCACHE, can cause this to occur. Consider disabling any limitations that are preventing frequently used data from being cached.

narrative.narrative-text: Certain file descriptor properties, such as F_NOCACHE, can cause this to occur. Consider disabling any limitations that are preventing frequently used data from being cached.

frame.name: outlined init with take of _ConditionalContent<A, B>.Storage
protocol witness for View.body.getter in conformance BackupOperationContainer<A>

narrative.fmt: PromptManager (34205) read logical block 0x4b77b52 from path /Users/simonfortelny/Library/Containers/simonfortelny.PromptManager/Data/Library/Application Support/default.store on disk after previously performing Data Read on it.

frame.name: partial apply for thunk for @callee_guaranteed () -> (@out A, @error @owned Error)
closure #1 in closure #2 in closure #2 in static BackupWriter.plan(projects:)
closure #2 in closure #2 in static BackupWriter.plan(projects:)
partial apply for thunk for @callee_guaranteed (@unowned Int, @guaranteed Feature) -> (@owned BackupWriter.FeaturePlan)
partial apply for thunk for @callee_guaranteed (@unowned Int, @guaranteed Project) -> (@owned BackupWriter.ProjectPlan)
partial apply for closure #2 in ExportSheet.body.getter

narrative.fmt: PromptManager (34205) performed 23 physical writes within 1 second. This can put excessive strain on physical storage media and hinder application performance.

narrative-text.fmt: physical writes within 1 second. This can put excessive strain on physical storage media and hinder application performance.

narrative.narrative-text: physical writes within 1 second. This can put excessive strain on physical storage media and hinder application performance.

narrative.fmt: A high rate of write activity often stems from involuntarily flushing to disk, usually in a loop.

narrative-text.fmt: A high rate of write activity often stems from involuntarily flushing to disk, usually in a loop.

narrative.narrative-text: A high rate of write activity often stems from involuntarily flushing to disk, usually in a loop.
